ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Country where the city is located */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "major_industries" TEXT /* JSON field to store a list of major industries in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "island_cities" (
  "island_city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each island-city relationship */,
  "island_id" INTEGER /* Island in the relationship */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* City in the relationship */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between the island and city */,
  "travel_time" TEXT /* Estimated travel time from the island to the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("island_city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_island_cities_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Unique license number of the agent */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the agent */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the agent */,
  "specializations" TEXT /* JSON field to store a list of specializations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact */,
  "interests" TEXT /* JSON field to store a list of interests */,
  "net_worth" REAL /* Estimated net worth of the client */,
  "investment_history" TEXT /* JSON field to store a list of previous investments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "island_agents" (
  "island_agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each island-agent relationship */,
  "island_id" INTEGER /* Island in the relationship */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Agent in the relationship */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the agent started managing the island */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the agent stopped managing the island (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("island_agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_island_agents_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "island_clients" (
  "island_client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each island-client relationship */,
  "island_id" INTEGER /* Island in the relationship */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Client in the relationship */,
  "interest_level" TEXT /* Level of interest the client has in the island */,
  "last_contacted" TEXT /* Date the client was last contacted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("island_client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_island_clients_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "island_id" INTEGER /* Island the price is for */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the island */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the price was recorded */,
  "price_type" TEXT /* Type of price (e.g., asking price, sale price) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction entry */,
  "island_id" INTEGER /* Island the prediction is for */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the island */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Model used for the prediction */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale entry */,
  "island_id" INTEGER /* Island sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price the island was sold for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the island was sold */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Agent who sold the island */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Client who bought the island */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was finalized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, agent, client) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who started the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged out */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the event logged */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time the event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
